sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68954" key="moxloeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοχλο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n68954.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a lever</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0660.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollon.Cit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
